message:
feat(alerts): add ProjectsDir config and pre-compile detection patterns

Improves alert generation performance and adds disk space monitoring support.

Config Addition:
- ProjectsDir field in alerts.Config for disk space check targeting
- Enables monitoring free space in the projects directory specifically

Performance Optimization:
- Pre-compile regex patterns for error detection at package init
- Pre-compile rate limit detection patterns
- Pre-compile ANSI escape sequence stripper
- Moves compilation from hot path to cold startup

Error Pattern Detection:
Pattern-based classification for agent output scanning:
- Critical: panic, fatal errors
- Error: exceptions, tracebacks, permission denied
- Warning: failures, timeouts, connection refused

Rate Limit Detection:
Consolidated patterns for API throttling detection:
- "rate limit", "too many requests", "429"
- "quota exceeded", "throttl*"

This reduces CPU overhead during continuous pane monitoring and enables
proactive disk space alerts before projects run out of space.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
